message:
Fix streaming SIMD padding bug, handle partial unicode escapes, simplify JS

- getValue() now caches remaining bytes before SIMD padding (fixes NDJSON
  getRemaining() returning empty when called after getValue)
- Autocomplete strips incomplete \uXXXX escapes instead of producing
  invalid JSON that crashes doc_parse (fixes unicode escape crash)
- Remove dead primitive checks in wrapDoc (buildDocRoot handles them)
- Simplify stringify (JSON.stringify works directly on Proxy)
- Simplify materialize (remove redundant guard)
- All 206 tests pass, 0 failures
